productPurpose: Help coding agents plan, build, inspect, and refine distinctive production frontends in the user's real application.

creativeFingerprint.premise: Product-native creative direction becomes trustworthy only when it survives implementation and rendered correction.
creativeFingerprint.composition: A compact operating contract routes progressively into direction, one relevant specialty, one golden system, and a full-page refinement loop.
creativeFingerprint.typeVoice: Direct, exact, anti-performative language that distinguishes creative judgment from objective command checks.
creativeFingerprint.materialAndMedia: Documentation remains compact; executable runtime source and a restrained functional visual fixture demonstrate advanced systems.
creativeFingerprint.motionAndInteraction: Native-first with one owner; Motion serves component state, GSAP serves choreography, and GPU runtimes are optional when the concept earns them.
creativeFingerprint.continuity: Product truth flows into a concept fingerprint, selected implementation system, desktop/mobile screenshots, visible repairs, and durable project memory.

protectedContracts: Dreative is a frontend agent skill and CLI, not a visual editor or deterministic design engine.
DREATIVE_FINALIZED certifies command success only, never taste or visual quality.
Rendered pixel inspection at desktop and 390px cannot be replaced by DOM or accessibility snapshots.
Showcase has no minimum treatment count.
Do not add approval hashes, attestations, critic scores, evidence ledgers, or fabricated benchmark claims.

runtimeOwners.scroll: Native scroll by default; Lenis only when the concept requires velocity or DOM/WebGL synchronization.
runtimeOwners.animation: One selected owner per behavior: Motion for component state, GSAP for coordinated choreography, native CSS/WAAPI for simpler states.
runtimeOwners.spatial: None by default; PixiJS for high-density 2D and Three.js/R3F/OGL for earned spatial behavior.

importantAssets.role: Executable source for the twelve golden systems.
Functional visual fixture for desktop and mobile inspection.
Screenshot, critique, repair, and recapture workflow.

checks: opening and post-hero composition visually inspected
scroll progress, drag rail, and spatial selection exercised
opening, frame sequence, adaptive canvas, spatial gallery, and final section visually inspected
persistent stage no longer leaks into the opening
spatial depth resolves to a shallow mobile state

deliberateDecisions.decision: Replace the broad effect catalogue with twelve executable golden systems.
deliberateDecisions.reason: Execution reliability and bounded choice are more useful than a large vocabulary of unproven effects.

deliberateDecisions.decision: Keep project memory small and human-readable.
deliberateDecisions.reason: Future agents need durable design intent without another governance or certification layer.
The user explicitly deferred it; no comparative quality claim should be made without controlled runs and blind evaluation.
